flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Carlow University fell 24% between 2006 and 2009 (60.0% → 45.3%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Carlow University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($18.5k → $21.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Carlow University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($32.4k → $35.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Carlow University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.5% → 0.0%).
